name: Senshukai Co., Ltd.
summary: Senshukai Co., Ltd. engages in the mail order, bridal, and corporate businesses in Japan. The company provides lifestyle products in various genres through catalogs, as well as Belle Maison Net. online shop; and products and services to corporations through catalogue sales. It also offers credit cards and insurance products; and manufacture products using natural water from Hokuto City. In addition, the company operates house wedding style wedding ceremony facilities; and 11 child daycare facilities in Tokyo and the Chiba Prefecture, and Osaka. Senshukai Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1946 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
